# mtncloud_execute_schedule (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud execute schedule by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_execute_schedule" "nightly" {
  name = "nightly-2am"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the schedule to look up.

### Read-Only

- `cron` (String) Cron expression.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the schedule.
- `timezone` (String) Schedule timezone.
